hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); [[ "$file" == *.ts || "$file" == *.tsx ]] && cd /e/agents-galore && npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null; exit 0'
bash -c 'cd /e/agents-galore || exit 0; [ -z "$(git status --porcelain)" ] && exit 0; npx tsc --noEmit 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git add -A && git commit -m "chore: apply claude session changes"'
